label: AccuWeather
description: Fetch real-time weather forecasts, conditions, and severe weather alerts from AccuWeather.

form.title: Connect AccuWeather
form.subtitle: Paste your AccuWeather API key to start pulling forecasts and weather alerts.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from the AccuWeather Developer Portal. Takes about 30 seconds — no OAuth flow required.
methods.how_to:
## Get your AccuWeather API key

1. Go to [developer.accuweather.com](https://developer.accuweather.com) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. Click **My Apps** in the top navigation bar.
3. Click **Add a New App**. Give it a name (e.g. `Anton`) and select the APIs you need (at minimum **Core Weather**).
4. Click **Create App**. The app card will display your **API Key** immediately.
5. Copy the key and paste it into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Free-tier keys are limited to 50 calls/day. If you need more, upgrade your plan under **My Account → Subscriptions**.
- New keys are usually active within a few minutes but can take up to 10 minutes to propagate.
- Keep your API key private — anyone with it can consume your quota.
- If you suspect exposure, delete the app in My Apps and create a new one.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in developer.accuweather.com → My Apps → your app card.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Leave as default unless you have been given a custom endpoint by AccuWeather.

fields.name: language
fields.label: Response Language
fields.description: Language for weather description text returned by the API.

fields.name: unit_system
fields.label: Unit System
fields.description: Temperature and measurement units returned in API responses.
